name: now-context
desc: current desktop state: AFK flag, focused window, last-15m app histogram (JSON)

name: sem-grep
desc: semantic search over the local assise repos; args = natural-language query

name: kin-opts
desc: evaluated NixOS option tree for this fleet; args = '<host> <option.path>' or '--hosts'

name: man-here
desc: version-exact man/--help/README for any CLI on PATH; args = command name

name: peek
desc: screenshot the desktop and answer a visual question about it; args = question

name: infer-queue
desc: status of the local arc/npu/cpu inference job queue
